rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Banned words — grep zero-tolerance.
Ritual / practice (noun) / ceremony — hard ban
No stale markers, no "fixed" retrospectives, no session biography.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Body region (lines 1-15) carries no dated/changelog markers; the dated Quality/Watch-for lines at L19-L40 are inside the maintainer block (exempt).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Register match.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: AE101 voice quintet honored: Boris-direct ("The move is to read") with a Risto forward-look at the close ("one level higher in abstraction... your intuition"), correct for M6 practitioner-fluency mood. No atmospheric/negation-callout faults in body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Rough-cut drafts for articles.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Article-drafting rule; target is a curriculum lecture, not an article draft.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Credit original when paraphrasing named technique.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Named moves are credited inline: "Klaassen ships Compound Engineering as a named framework"; Cherny / Pocock / Cognition / Amp / Ronacher each attributed in body. No creator-name or author-we leak in body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Always "you", never "the student"; teacher framing stays out of body.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Body uses second person ("By now you've shipped...", "Your intuition"); no "the student" or trainer-mechanics in body region. Delivery notes ("Read aloud in-room") live below the maintainer cut.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Terms in body (kit, skill, verifier, subagent, hooks, MCP, slash commands) are M6-arc-earned operational vocabulary, not maintainer-only terms-of-art. No self-compound / substrate / three-pattern leak.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Over-hedge detector.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No reassurance-shaped sentences (no "no penalty", "it's OK if", "not a downgrade"). The "there is no prompt to drill" line is a register signpost, not a defense of a choice.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verbatim-frame-cite in reference artefact.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Concerns capturing a user-supplied verbal frame in a reference artefact; not applicable to this lecture body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cap practitioner attribution at one student-side mention per module.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Seven practitioners each named exactly once; the lecture's content IS the lineage walk + worked-example pointer (maintainer block invokes the rule-11 carve-out). No single practitioner repeated.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Punchy framing keeps punch; carve-out lives downstream.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: "The move is to read" and "choice is approaching infinite" land cleanly; no slogan that overstates and needs a missing boundary paragraph.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + project strategy docs, NOT student-facing curriculum body.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No flag phrases ("not an aspirational X", "the real practitioners", "not marketing") and no "vendor" in body. "the practitioners this curriculum surveys" is deliberate sample-scoping (per maintainer Sample-not-universe watch), not a positioning defense.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Watch out for planting jargon too early.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: M6 lecture; composition vocabulary (subagent, hooks, MCP, verifier, skill stack) is at or below the M6 arc level and lands operationally in the M6 supplementary it points to. No LLM-internal jargon (token, embedding, inference) planted.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Audit closer when trimming body-prose forcing function.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Lecture has no fenced prompt and no forcing function to trim; dangling-pronoun / bypass-punchline failure mode does not arise. Closer "Your intuition." is intact and well-moored.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Past tense for exercise recap sections — heading and body.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Lecture has no exercise recap / What happened / Debrief section. Present-tense field-state prose ("Klaassen ships...") is stable-invariant description, correctly present.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No combative verbs about the agent in body prose.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Agent-facing verbs stay peer-flat ("the human invokes", "Claude Code can build the kit"). No bark/order/command/whip/drag verbs about the agent.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Aspirational destination, never corrective gap.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Aspirational and tier-neutral: "By now you've shipped enough on your own", "calls for intuition and taste. Your intuition." No corrective gap, no ability-tier pegging, no plausibly-failable pre-prompt gate (lecture has none).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Earn every technical term on first use.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: By M6 the load-bearing terms (kit, skill, verifier, subagent, composition) are earned across the arc; "You have a kit: a test-strategy skill, a verifier, a second skill" re-grounds concretely. No cold unearned abstract noun.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Business-audience word ban (Agents 101 default).
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: AE101 file (software-engineer ICs); the Agents-101 business-audience word ban does not gate engineer-facing AE101 prose. Terms used are appropriate for the engineer audience.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Memory vs context — use deliberately.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: "where memory closes" (L8) uses memory as the persistent-artifact concept; no "context compounds" conflation anywhere in body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Golden path only in body.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Body is calm forward-moving narrative; no troubleshooting / "what if X fails" branches. (The skip-if-tight delivery note is below the maintainer cut.)

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Trust Claude's defaults for structure.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prompt-structure rule (output destination + show-me-before-saving); lecture contains no prompt.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Q1/Q2/Q3 retro interview is banned at every module. Compound-shape varies per module — never repeat same Debrief.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Debrief/compound-shape rule; this is a closer-area lecture, not a module Debrief.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Don't smuggle another module's voice.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Voice is M6 practitioner-fluency / curriculum-stepping-back; no borrowed M1-joy or other-module mood.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Don't ask student to manually diff or spot-check Claude's output as error-catching.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No student diff/spot-check ask; the lecture's only directed action is reading the supplementary.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Simulation personas never alone.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Self-study-simulation rule; not applicable to a lecture.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No "What research says" callout boxes
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No consultancy-deck callout box; field attributions are woven as inline practitioner sentences.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Student moves stay in conversation with agent.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: The single student move is "the move is to read" the supplementary; no editor/terminal/file-edit primitive smuggled in as a forcing function.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Specify which CLAUDE.md layer — every time.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Body references no CLAUDE.md layer, so no unqualified-layer ambiguity to resolve.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No em-dashes. Simple sentences.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No em-dashes in body region; sentences are short and declarative.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Section headers use command verbs when section is about doing something.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Lecture body has only the H1 title and no doing-sections; reader's job is understanding, so declarative framing is correct.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Inline links use target's title, never filename.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: L14 link reads [Workflow composition lineages](...), a title-cased label, not a backtick path or filename.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Disambiguate shared-word collisions with Claude Code primitives on first student-authored use.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No first student-authored write of a contested word here; "memory" / "skill" / "subagent" are used as already-earned reading vocabulary at M6, not as a first authored write needing disambiguation.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: LLM-vs-agent-vs-Claude vocabulary discipline.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Acting framed via agent/subagent ("advisor agents that contribute intelligence, not actions", "the chain should be doing the human"); product framed via Claude Code ("Your Claude Code can build the kit"). Discipline holds.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No time-of-day anchors in body prose.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No tomorrow/overnight/this-morning/tonight phrasing in body. "right now" / "keep moving" are session-relative, allowed.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Reflection beats stay invisible in flow.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No pedagogy-aware header or contemplative-pause prefix ("sit with", "let it land", "step back"). The register-shift signpost "there is no prompt to drill" is a plain declarative, not a wellness/coach opener.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No meta-ask when student has already decided.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No prompt and no Claude-asks-student-what-they-decided loop in this lecture.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: `.md` is default file type for student artifacts across curriculum.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No save-as / artifact-filename prompt in this lecture.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cut NVA: true but not moving student forward.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Body is tight per the explicit length-discipline ceiling; each paragraph advances (frame, field walk, pointer, lead-out). No implementation-detail or maintainer-reasoning leak in body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Body "read it" / "look at it" / "notice X" after chat-print = dead weight.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: "The move is to read" directs reading of an external supplementary (a real next move), not narration of an already-printed chat artifact. No generic "read it" / "notice X" dead weight.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forward-callout closer: student as grammatical subject.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Forward-looking close keeps the student as subject/possessor ("This is one of those places that calls for intuition and taste. Your intuition."); no training-as-subject, coach-imperative, generic-they, or role-gating shift.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Operational reminders live at moment of use, not only where introduced.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Lecture invokes no per-module operational setting (thinking-effort, model, mode tag) that would need a moment-of-use reminder.
